function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD in 99_system, 40_projects, and 10_entities/cast, resolved informal entity via canonical cast file, then enumerated project involvement using structured entity identifier and read all matched project records.
function.outcome_justification: 10_entities/cast/ida.md defines Ida as school-age daughter; 10_entities/cast/oskar.md defines Oskar as kindergarten-age. Project README files show linked_entities containing entity.ida in five projects, whose exact names are reported sorted alphabetically.
